name: personallog
description: SuperInstance personal logging app for everyday use
author: SuperInstance

scripts.dev: npm run verify:wasm || true && next dev -p 3002
scripts.build: npm run verify:wasm || npm run build:wasm:missing-error && next build
scripts.test: npm run test:wasm && npm run type-check
scripts.build:wasm: cd native/rust && wasm-pack build --target web --weak-refs --out-dir pkg
scripts.build:wasm:release: cd native/rust && wasm-pack build --release --target web --weak-refs --out-dir pkg
scripts.build:wasm:missing-error: echo "Error: wasm-pack not found. Install Rust toolchain: https://www.rust-lang.org/tools/install" && exit 1
scripts.watch:wasm: cd native/rust && cargo watch -s 'wasm-pack build --target web --weak-refs --out-dir pkg'
scripts.predev: npm run build:wasm || echo "Warning: WASM build failed. Run 'npm run build:wasm' after installing Rust toolchain."
scripts.prebuild: npm run build:wasm:release || echo "Warning: WASM release build failed. Run 'npm run build:wasm:release' after installing Rust toolchain."
